item.description:
What's New

  • add Xcode-26.5-17F5032f by @starhaven-bot[bot]
  • add macOS-26.5-25F5068a by @starhaven-bot[bot]
  • add macOS-26.5-25F71 by @starhaven-bot[bot]
  • add Xcode-26.5-17F42 by @starhaven-bot[bot]

Fixes

  • use brew bump-cask-pr for explicit version bumps
  • extract xipFile from services-account `path=` query

Testing

  • expand BinaryStringScanner coverage, split ScannerTests.swift
